name: Passover Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and chocolate together over hot water.
2. Beat the eggs, gradually add sugar until thick.
3. Add melted chocolate and butter, then blend well.
4. Fold in matzo cake meal and chopped nuts.
5. Pour mixture into a greased 8-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 45 minutes.
7. Cool completely before cutting into squares.
